name: code-review
description: Standalone HTML code-review writeup: PR header, summary, severity-graded findings, test-coverage notes, and reviewer sign-off.

slots.description: Review title; used in <title> and the h1.
Repo + PR identifier line, e.g. 'org/repo · PR #247'.
Review status pill text; element class picks the enum variant.
Extra header meta items: author, open date, diff stat.
2-4 sentence summary of what the PR does and why.
One block per finding; severity, location, problem, suggestion.
Key/value rows of test-coverage observations (new tests, delta, gaps, CI status).
Sign-off block; class on .signoff selects the verdict variant.
Verdict label; element class selects the variant.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.finding[]: { severity: enum[blocker,high,med,low,nit], location: string (file:line), title: string, description: string, suggestion: string }
